use_cases: A simple counter with increment and decrement buttons for numerical input control
State management demo showing React useState hook with button interactions
Interactive number picker for forms or settings interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist counter component featuring increment and decrement buttons that modify a numeric state value. Built with React useState hook, it demonstrates basic interactive button behavior with plain Tailwind styling. The component serves as a foundation for numeric input controls in forms or as a standalone UI element for stepper functionality.
